title: Tubewell Pump Control Panel Price in Pakistan 2026 — DOL, Star-Delta & Auto-Start Complete Buyer Guide
author: CNC Electric
tags: tubewell control panel price in pakistan
summary_html: Complete buyer guide to tubewell pump control panel prices in Pakistan 2026. Compare DOL (Rs 8,000), star-delta (Rs 25,000), auto-start with protections (Rs 35,000+), and VFD/soft-start panels. Covers DOL vs star-delta vs VFD starting, the four mandatory protections (single-phasing preventer, overload, dry-run, over/under-voltage), contactor and breaker sizing rule (FLC ≈ HP × 1.5 A), enclosure IP selection, and an 11-point pre-purchase checklist for WAPDA 3-phase tubewells.
